basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Gorakhpur Non-Academic Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Gorakhpur (AIIMS Gorakhpur)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Gorakhpur (AIIMS Gorakhpur) Non-Academic Junior Resident (Dental) Notification 2026 has been released on 06 July 2026 on the official website of AIIMS Gorakhpur. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Gorakhpur Non-Academic Junior Resident (Dental) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 37 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST up to 5 years, OBC up to 3 years, PwBD General 10 years, OBC 13 years, SC/ST 15 years

qualification.education_qualification: BDS from DCI recognized institute with compulsory rotatory internship completion certificate
qualification.details: BDS from DCI recognized institute. Candidate must have completed compulsory rotatory internship and must produce an internship completion certificate.

salary_details.details: In Pay Matrix (Level-10) with a minimum of Rs.56,100/- + NPA (for medical personnel) as per recommendations of the 7th CPC.

selection_process: Interview Written Examination (if large number of candidates)

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Gorakhpur Non-Academic Junior Resident (Dental) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Gorakhpur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Gorakhpur Non-Academic Junior Resident (Dental) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for AIIMS Gorakhpur Non-Academic Junior Resident (Dental) Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Gorakhpur Non-Academic Junior Resident (Dental) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for AIIMS Gorakhpur?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Non-Academic Junior Resident (Dental) posts at AIIMS Gorakhpur is scheduled for 20th July 2026. Candidates should report as per the specified time for registration.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Resident (Dental) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a BDS degree from a DCI recognized institute and have completed their compulsory rotatory internship, with a valid completion certificate.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Non-Academic Junior Resident (Dental) post is 37 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Resident (Dental) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary in Pay Matrix (Level-10) with a minimum of Rs. 56,100/- per month, plus NPA for medical personnel.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Resident (Dental) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Non-Academic Junior Resident (Dental) position announced by AIIMS Gorakhpur.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 500/- for General/OBC candidates and Rs. 250/- for SC/ST candidates. Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an interview. However, a written examination may be conducted if there is a large number of applicants.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the AIIMS Gorakhpur office. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for the exact venue details and reporting time.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, internship completion certificate, and category certificates (if applicable), along with self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the Non-Academic Junior Resident (Dental) positions at AIIMS Gorakhpur are contractual in nature.
